name: docs-reconciliation
description: Multi-document reconciliation engine. Cross-references PRD (always present) against UX Design System and/or Mock documents to detect conflicts, coverage gaps, scope additions, naming drift, cascade violations, and specificity gaps. Supports bilateral (PRD+UX or PRD+Mock) and trilateral (PRD+UX+Mock) modes. Generates: (1) markdown reconciliation report with per-document maturity scores, (2) interactive HTML dashboard with coverage heatmap, filterable matrix, and per-document gauges, (3) optional Excalidraw diagrams — user is prompted before generation, (4) automatic Puppeteer element detection for HTML mocks — renders pages and verifies PRD requirements/components exist in the DOM, and (5) incremental delta mode — carries forward unchanged requirements, re-analyzes only new/changed ones, generates delta summary with score trends and finding diffs.
